author: d-eniz
description: Jupyter notebook support within your vault for interactive programming, live outputs, and notebook syncing.
name: JupyMD

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: # JupyMD 1.7.0 This release introduces a new interpreter selector window, making it much easier to setup and manage the Python environment JupyMD uses. As part of that change, the old Quick Setup button has been deprecated in favor of the new built-in venv creation flow inside the interpreter selector. You can now create virtual environments directly from the new UI. There are also a couple of supporting improvements around this new flow. `pyenv` environments are included in interpreter discovery, and the status bar shows the interpreter or environment currently in use. Many thanks to our new contributor @aribaza for her work on this release! ## Full Changelog ### Features * add pyenv support to kernel discovery ([e1106b2](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/e1106b2a6b97d359b84b7dd17b2d1ad60152d79d)) * add source badges to kernel selector ([4696f8d](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/4696f8d239b461890c1343141c2483855c905660)) * clean venv creation option by removing second setup label ([4117036](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/4117036e3ffbe92042a129dad1ad7d5d46144859)) * create venv option added in context manager ([62ac18f](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/62ac18f53c115c235d131813995a05b2c0a9e34a)) * **create-venv:** add modal for creating virtual environments and integrate with kernel selector ([336757f](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/336757f9657b3cacdb73e266c3f76d17ab3d5965)) * display interpreter name instead of path in status bar ([3f1722a](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/3f1722ae53e3857b3ce47846f9d0ad9b3e13a7e8)) * improve kernel status bar interactions ([35449b4](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/35449b4b4f850145423050b12d64e81c3ac2aab6)) * **kernel-selector:** add command to select Python kernel ([3e54609](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/3e546094fb19bb8188482f737a1d24607cb03438)) * **kernel-selector:** add styling for kernel status and suggestions in the UI ([95f63bb](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/95f63bbf54cba5ecb487bebfe32f99b3a05b1228)) * **kernel-selector:** implement kernel selection modal and discovery utils ([20e3cde](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/20e3cdef9f45f24e027657d251d60e9247750502)) * **kernel-selector:** implement status bar for current Python interpreter and kernel selection ([feaa17e](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/feaa17e561874ed76e90ac56a14e95a07641c0bc)) * **kernel-selector:** modify settings page to access new kernel selector functionality ([cca8930](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/cca89306d407e2ec8c4e5c58ba169b19ba26f529)) * reduce stroke width of clear icon ([ff42a1d](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/ff42a1dca3393e6ef42dc8a7cdd66336892cda3c)) * show interpreter versions in settings ([32cb61d](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/32cb61db8c37b00376d1de4df0aa92488c7b281e)) * use fuzzy interpreter picker for venv creation ([c43f04d](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/c43f04d610f9b0de271390257f28debc12c93003)) ### Bug Fixes * **kernel-selector:** improve text handling in settings ([19a91ae](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/19a91aeed44e8dfffd6aa62ea38b5671fa723613)) * **kernel-selector:** improve text handling in settings ([5daedad](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/5daedad4a65dab62143bf1281947a6b3f3c7cc1d)) * restart kernels silently after interpreter changes ([d98df15](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/d98df15180f886931515517ef437bf1b91d1ff59)) * settings interpreter display did not update when changing interpreter ([1fbd342](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/1fbd3427ad4517749c8f9d93263342648e41a3b6))

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: # JupyMD 1.6.0 This release adds new features that make quickly running large chunks of code possible, and some changes to reduce friction during note conversion. Major changes include: - New "Run Above" and "Run Cell and Below" buttons on code blocks - New commands to run all code blocks and delete all outputs - Automatic note conversion on code block execution setting (enabled by default) - CSS improvements for parity with themes ## Full Changelog ### Features * add split run button with dropdown actions for above and below ([ed57daa](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/ed57daac75492586824f6a9f757672c2a9e0bb51)) * **code-block:** always show run controls ([e7158cc](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/e7158ccd03ffdc241f1825b5687e7acd9aa15c5c)) * **commands:** add note-wide execution actions ([a173fd6](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/a173fd66c238acdba9424de5024c5e49a925eb3d)) * **executor:** run and clear all cells in note ([618376b](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/618376b962fd8600c549c087f783aa79de1c616f)) * **settings:** add auto-convert on run toggle ([7634659](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/76346591299d962a2ca3b499df0bec4a78ead4ed)) * support run-above and run-below notebook cell execution ([e3be91c](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/e3be91c4a691c790dfb6e2bf63fcfa7a18999666)) * **types:** add notebook run settings and output event ([f7cc3f6](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/f7cc3f63d92df277178919311034497d15974ca2)) * **ui:** add shadcn-codicon-chevron-down icon ([df53f42](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/df53f4268e19621c12b8eab7ff3fd0791a073df3)) * **ui:** add shadcn-codicon-run-above icon ([a19f497](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/a19f49725229b058dc0c082236ed4e3d79cbf3f2)) * **ui:** add shadcn-codicon-run-below icon ([c618ecd](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/c618ecd36a7e600b9950e0428b8b57cdf5dd591d)) * **ui:** change run icon to shadcn-codicon-play for parity with other run buttons ([4b99d26](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/4b99d26260c062c2144f299fcc4cb3e751c81cc6)) ### Bug Fixes * **sync:** preserve outputs during markdown sync ([00fc6eb](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/commit/00fc6eba1c4ad72e76286611b6ffed50a0bda4ff))

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# JupyMD 1.5.1

Adds minor tweaks to settings page to abide by Obsidian's plugin guidelines and fixes an error on the code executor component not using the configured Python interpreter.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/compare/1.5.0...1.5.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: # JupyMD 1.5 This release brings major UX improvements and aims to address cross-platform stability issues. This version has been tested on both Linux and Windows, however please raise an issue if you are experiencing problems with the new version. ## What's New ### User Experience - Added "Quick Setup" button to settings which sets up a `.jupymd` virtual environment at the vault root, configures it as the interpreter, and installs necessary libraries. 334dd0348c8d761c901dcaeb2fe0ad07a7d80ce3 - Respective `.ipynb` files of paired notes are now automatically deleted when the note is deleted. e6c9f69526dceea9c80fc49abb57e4cbe659a85a #41 #38 - Respective `.ipynb` files of paired notes are now automatically moved when the note is moved. e6c9f69526dceea9c80fc49abb57e4cbe659a85a dff68920c07d29617d0f21682bc6af7e1c65d423 #41 - Deleting the `jupyter` frontmatter property now fully unlinks paired notes. a6298bebcd9e4ea28980e547f5da0bc2499695fd 62fd942b231ba47778ad83d14380555eafbc1f11 7c8874379f48f3dcdf8411cceee50e0da574f57f #38 - The Python kernel now automatically restarts when necessary. Removed the "Restart Python kernel" command. 88b6f5bab078a177f23484a0adc417711fa266af fe455c2161a194cb78af355e01a63f74d994ca25 6f356d09b2c60764093a902a6a7efc07605f819b ### Cross-Platform Stability - Refactored Jupytext invoking and stringified kernelspec passed onto Jupytext command. 261af99d36effdab46593b4cdfe596ae9178dd5e #24 #34 #40 - Ensured child processes use the configured Python environment. 8f5d20d6e3e3a1c7c454247d0bda49b8ffb918c3 #33 ### Bugs - Fixed run buttons being visible on unpaired notes. a6298bebcd9e4ea28980e547f5da0bc2499695fd - The Python execution wrapper now correctly catches SystemExit exceptions (like those invoked by libraries such as click), preventing them from crashing the execution loop. c2acd22b13f5ffff45fafe91c0ac8b8634860ce9 #35 **Full changelog**: https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/compare/1.4.9...1.5.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# JupyMD 1.4.9

This version fixes note conversion problems on Windows caused by an oversight implemented in [version 1.4.6](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/releases/tag/1.4.6). (#34)

## Behaviour

- Changed `createNotebook()` to use platform-specific JSON escaping (backslash escaped double quotes on Windows, single quoted string on Linux/macOS) to fix shell command parsing errors when setting notebook metadata across different operating systems 01fa7533bc8f39e46b45da6c3b72671a423ed0ef

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# JupyMD 1.4.8

Code blocks are now rendered when a file is exported as PDF. (#18, #31)

## Improvements

e0142d8fa82318f9ed28b445d55ba509e16c5e93
- activeFile is now fetched from ctx.sourceFile instead of app.workspace.getActiveFile
- await on registerMarkdownCodeBlockProcessor
- Added a fallback rendering path to render code blocks correctly when section metadata is unavailable (as is during PDF export)

## Known issues

PDF and reading view styling issues still need to be addressed:
- Missing vertical spacing between code blocks
- Empty output containers rendering for code blocks without outputs (should be fully hidden)
 
Thank you @divyenduz for your contribution :)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# JupyMD 1.4.7

This release changes the working directory of the Python executor to the current file's path (#27) .

## Behaviour

- Set `cwd` property of `pythonProcess` to current file's path fb76e7af2a77342d38e9fbe9461307ea1178ed70

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# JupyMD 1.4.6

This release adds kernelspec metadata for created Jupyter notebooks (#24) and fixes path incompatibilities due to special characters (#9).

## Features

- Add quotations around interpreter path (f6ca591e2e847f164c2335736a82da3b76d230ee)
- Add kernelspec metadata through Jupytext (cf7b9cbeb84b87ab2d4e08a126fa193a4e0099d5)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# JupyMD 1.4.5

This release adds error notices for sync and execution errors, referring the user to the console for a full error message. (#23)

## Features

- Added error notifications for notebook update and Python process issues fd968754160ccbf1378d92420d0dd23063e54dd0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## JupyMD 1.4.4

This release fixes the bug converting all files to .ipynb as per #21.

The unidirectional syncing introduced in [1.4.3](https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/releases/tag/1.4.3) is achieved by converting a file to .ipynb (which overwrites existing paired .ipynb files to achieve sync) rather than using the Jupytext sync behaviour. Due to an error in the method checking if a file is paired, this caused every modified file in the vault to be converted into Jupyter notebooks.

### Behaviour

- Check modified file rather than active file f289c7c90997f8fa30cdd6e81a7f68fbda686bf9
- Check .md and .ipynb only 898d39bd1ad90f7f4f247ebb963a5e215cfcfce7

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## JupyMD 1.4.3

This release adds new options to alleviate sync problems, as per #17.

### Behaviour

- The default sync setting is now unidirectional 8cba47cf8be1cfe08d974f13993f9bb3deb9fedf

### Features

- Added support for unidirectional sync and the option to switch between unidirectional and bidirectional sync 8cba47cf8be1cfe08d974f13993f9bb3deb9fedf 0515fb33b8d7c00f6beeaec4541966f80b1c3e1b
- Fixed minor punctuation mistakes and reordered settings tab 8cba47cf8be1cfe08d974f13993f9bb3deb9fedf

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## JupyMD 1.4.2

This release aims to further combat the sync issues discussed in #17.

### Behaviour

- Force-update markdown file after pushing code block output to Jupyter notebook to prevent .ipynb sided sync bias 9b9c9206531521c6960c0c73f0b1b61e01d1222e

### Features

- Added command to manually trigger sync 846847c0a6e2aae3f7066bd9c8b7812be6d0fab6
- Added setting to disable automatic sync f018e477b1a3484eeb693d93c09fd59a5eae86f1 364953844dbba5bda1746b00f5ff796c7f4a38a7
- Organised settings page 364953844dbba5bda1746b00f5ff796c7f4a38a7

releases.description:
## What's Changed

- New feature to convert existing Jupyter notebooks to linked markdown files within the vault
- Enhanced support for using custom interpreters
- Fixed bug creating multiple settings instances when selecting interpreter

---

* Fix: Resolve Python env timeout + Feat: convert Jupyter Notebooks into a Markdown note via Jupytext by @caezium in https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/pull/13

## New Contributors

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/d-eniz/jupymd/compare/1.3...1.4
